recent_events.detail: signal_to_ledger adapter implements PIT-302/403/408 enforcement; 12/12 unit tests GREEN.

M2 ran end-to-end adapter test on 5 synthetic Gulei signals: 3 supporting + 2 contradicting refs produced correctly. Live SignalFusionEngine import blocked by src.backend path constraint; needs cds-keyperson cwd to run. stale_count=1.

5-persona review on P7 M1 adapter_signal_to_ledger.py: median=5.0, sorted [4,5,5,6,6]. R3 (MiniMax-M3) named the fabricated snippet_sha256_prefix as binding weakness (real audit-chain defect). R5 (qwen3.5-122b-a10b) named the source_id double-prefix as systemic not typo. R2 named missing_data/source_failure semantic overlap. Per methodology-scaffolding threshold (5.0 not 6.5), verdict=research_grade_acceptable.
P7 M1 review R3 (MiniMax-M3) identified fabricated snippet_sha256_prefix (ljust pad). Replaced with hashlib.sha256 of canonical signal content; 2 regression tests added; 14/14 tests GREEN.
P7 adapter + PIT-NEW-9 fix contributed to joint-methods-paper outline (docs/papers/joint-methods-paper-outline.md). 6-persona review median=4.0 < 4.5: FALLBACK to P11 workshop paper.

m2_partial_findings.engine_import_blocker: SignalFusionEngine uses from src.backend... imports that fail outside cds-keyperson repo; cannot run live without that repo as cwd

m1_review_verdict.next_action: keep as paper-scoped bridge; document PIT-302 strictness + fabricated sha256_prefix; defer live integration until cds-keyperson import refactor

pit_new_candidates_added.name: fabricated_sha256_prefix
pit_new_candidates_added.description: snippets passed to evidence_ledger_entry.snippet_sha256_prefix must be a real SHA256 of the source content. Fake hash strings (e.g. 'abc__________' from ljust pad) break the audit chain.
pit_new_candidates_added.fix_path: compute sha256 of signal_id + scenario + scenario_text + numeric_forecast bytes; truncate to 12 hex chars

pit_new_9_status.fix_path: experiments/adapter_signal_to_ledger.py line 105-115 (replaces ljust pad with hashlib.sha256 of canonical signal content)
pit_new_9_status.new_audit_chain: snippet_sha256_prefix now = sha256(signal_id + scenario + scenario_text + numeric_forecast)[:12] hex
